overview.description: The iShares Intermediate Muni Income Active ETF (INMU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed and holds a portfolio of US municipal bonds in different credit ratings, with an average duration of four to six years. INMU was launched on Mar 16, 2021 and is issued by BlackRock.
